criteria.text: the embedded canonical templates render scaffolds decode-equivalent to the retired string builders for every class and the spike variant, proven by equivalence tests on decoded fields

a store template override with an added body section and a custom: field scaffolds new specs accordingly, the custom content survives strict decode and canonical re-emit, and an anchor/dialect violation inside custom: still fails closed
verdi model check instantiates and strict-decodes every resolved template (store overrides and embedded), failing closed naming the offending template, proven by driving the built binary
